creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ak
Date: Sat Nov 23 14:14:16 2013
New Revision: 334671
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/334671

Log:
  - Update maintainer email
  
  PR:	ports/184189
  Submitted by:	Vladimir Kondratiev <wulf@mail.mipt.ru> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/rubygem-debugger-linecache/Makefile
  head/devel/rubygem-debugger-xml/Makefile
  head/devel/rubygem-debugger/Makefile
  head/emulators/fuse-roms/Makefile
  head/mail/cyrus2dovecot/Makefile
  head/multimedia/smpeg2/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/rubygem-debugger-linecache/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/rubygem-debugger-linecache/Makefile	Sat Nov 23 14:14:03 2013	(r334670)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-debugger-linecache/Makefile	Sat Nov 23 14:14:16 2013	(r334671)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ PORTVERSION=	1.2.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
-MAINTAINER=	wulf@mail.mipt.ru
+MAINTAINER=	wulf@cicgroup.ru
 COMMENT=	Caches(Ruby source) Files as Might Be Used in a Debugger
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes

Modified: head/devel/rubygem-debugger-xml/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/rubygem-debugger-xml/Makefile	Sat Nov 23 14:14:03 2013	(r334670)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-debugger-xml/Makefile	Sat Nov 23 14:14:16 2013	(r334671)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ PORTVERSION=	0.1.6
 CATEGORIES=	devel rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
-MAINTAINER=	wulf@mail.mipt.ru
+MAINTAINER=	wulf@cicgroup.ru
 COMMENT=	XML interface for rubygem-debugger
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-debugger>=1.6.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-debugger \

Modified: head/devel/rubygem-debugger/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/rubygem-debugger/Makefile	Sat Nov 23 14:14:03 2013	(r334670)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-debugger/Makefile	Sat Nov 23 14:14:16 2013	(r334671)

 RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-columnize>=0.3.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-columnize \

-MAINTAINER=	wulf@mail.mipt.ru
